channel.title: Notch So Good Updates
channel.description: Automatic updates for Notch So Good

item.title: Version 4.1.0
item.description:
What's New in 4.1.0

Chawd reacts to what your agent is doing (glasses while reading, pencil while editing, confetti on completion). Fluid notch curves — no more sharp top corners. Global hotkeys ⌃⌥A/⌃⌥D to approve/deny permissions from anywhere. Daily shift report in the menu bar. Cleaner uninstall. Optional anonymous stats (off unless built with a key).
